gaps.accept_criteria: grep -c 'triggers:' .agents/skills/doc_builder/SKILL.md → 1 (YAML key present with array of ≥5 quoted phrases)
grep -c '^## When to Invoke' .agents/skills/doc_builder/SKILL.md → 1 (section present; current '## Trigger' section is functionally equivalent but does not match 9arm canonical name)
grep -c '^## Operating Stance' .agents/skills/doc_builder/SKILL.md → 1 AND grep -c '^- ' section ≥ 4 (present with 4 bullets — passes minimum)

grep -c '^## Workflow' .agents/skills/doc_builder/SKILL.md → 1 AND section contains at least one explicit stop/halt condition (current §1–§6 workflow is spread across multiple ad-hoc sections without a unified ## Workflow header or explicit stop conditions)
grep -c '^## Tone Guide' .agents/skills/doc_builder/SKILL.md → 1 (separate from existing '## Output Tone' section — both must coexist)

present: YAML front-matter (name + description present; triggers phrases embedded in description prose — not a formal triggers: array)
## When NOT to Use (4 bullets — passes minimum)
## Prerequisites (3 items with Why/Missing — passes minimum)
## Hard Rules (8 rules — passes minimum of ≥5)
## Output Tone (present but is NOT the required '## Tone Guide' section)
